quest.Name: If You Die in a River...

step.Name: Ally with Urahiah
step.text: Convince Urahiah to let you help her find the tomb.

step.Name: Find the hidden cache
step.text: Find the hidden vault under the Tomb of the Eaters.

step.Name: Delve to the bottom
step.text: Reach the end of the vault.

step.Name: Kill the Moon King
step.text: Put an end to the reign of the Moon King.

step.Name: Eradicate Moon King fever
step.text: Slay the mad graverobber, putting an end to Moon King fever for good.

step.Name: Put Agnosi to rest
step.text: Permanently relieve Agnosi of his duties.
